title: Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Annotatedscreenplays.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars:
The Annotated Screenplays'' |author=[[Laurent Bouzereau]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |release date=[[September 8]], [[1997]]{{RandomHouseOld|url=author/results.pperl?authorid=2885|text=Laurent Bouzereau}} |type=Softcover |pages=336 |dimensions=8.3 x 5.5 x 0.7 inches |weight=10.6 ounces |isbn=0345409817 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays''''' contains the scripts for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] (including [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|''Special Edition'']] changes). This book is unique in that it includes information on how earlier drafts of the scripts differed from the final versions. However, it only has changes from the [[1997]] releases of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[original trilogy]] as it was published in [[1998]]. The book also includes comments from [[George Lucas]], [[Lawrence Kasdan]] and other individuals responsible for creating the movies. ==Publisher's summary== ''Luke Skywalker was Annikin Starkiller.'' ''Han Solo was a "huge green-skinned guy with no nose and large gills."'' ''And Princess Leia had a bit part.'' ''Here, at last, is the definitive ''Star Wars'' script collection—all three full-length screenplays, presented with the secrets that led to their creation!'' ''Through hours of exclusive interviews with George Lucas, Lawrence Kasdan, Irvin Kershner, and others involved in crafting the original trilogy, Laurent Bouzereau has uncovered the complex process through which life was breathed into the legendary ''Star Wars'' saga. Then, by exhaustively annotating the actual scripts, he reveals the fascinating tale behind each step in the evolution of these blockbuster films.'' ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[Naffer]] {{1stm}} |organisms= |droids= |technology= |locations= *[[Acquis]] |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |events= |miscellanea= }} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|Special Edition 2022|Cut to the Chase}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: ანოტირებული სცენარები }} [[Category:Script books]]
